data.current_description: Creates a new lead and assigns it to a specific agent within the workspace.
data.summary_suggestion: Create and assign new lead to agent
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new lead within the workspace and assigns it to a specified agent. Requires a CreateLeadRequest payload containing lead information and the target agent ID. Returns a CreateLeadResponse with the created lead's ID and confirmation details. The lead is immediately available for the assigned agent to work with.
